patterns_identified.summary: Pitcher K overs went 4-9 with ROI -34.23%, model overestimated K thresholds across the slate.
patterns_identified.adjustment_rule: Cap pitcher K thresholds 0.5 below market average and require 6+ projected innings before taking K over.

patterns_identified.summary: B tier (high confidence) ROI -13.38% underperformed watch tier (25.37%); confidence calibration is inverted on this slate.
patterns_identified.adjustment_rule: Apply 5 point confidence haircut to B tier picks until 7 day rolling B tier ROI returns to positive.

patterns_identified.summary: 6 hitter props voided due to player not in lineup (likely scratched, IL, or roster mismatch).
patterns_identified.adjustment_rule: Confirm hitter is on active roster within 2 hours of first pitch before publishing Hits chips; haircut confidence by 10 if pulled from projected lineup.

patterns_identified.summary: F5 ML lost 8 times — chosen starters trailed at the 5 inning mark too often.
patterns_identified.adjustment_rule: Cap F5 ML confidence at 60 when opposing starter has K rate above 25 percent or recent ERA under 3.50.

patterns_identified.summary: 8 losses tagged STARTER_REGRESSION, including blowup outings under 5 IP.
patterns_identified.adjustment_rule: Cap starter side confidence at 60 when the most recent start had 5 plus ER in 5 or fewer IP.

patterns_identified.summary: Multiple Hits voids stem from 11:30 AM publish using projected lineups that did not match the actual lineup card.
patterns_identified.adjustment_rule: Add a lineup confirmation gate: publish Hits chips only after the official lineup post hits at first pitch minus 2 hours.

patterns_identified.summary: K market went 3-7 ROI -45.0%; chosen starters fell short of K thresholds 6 times. Pattern continues from yesterday.
patterns_identified.adjustment_rule: Cap pitcher K thresholds 0.5 below market average and require projected 6 plus innings AND a recent start with 7 plus Ks before taking K over.

patterns_identified.summary: F5 ML lost 2 times; chosen starters trailed at the 5 inning mark.
patterns_identified.adjustment_rule: Cap F5 ML confidence at 60 when opposing starter has K rate above 25 percent or recent ERA under 3.50.

patterns_identified.summary: 4 hitter props voided due to player not in lineup or assigned to the wrong gamePk (Suzuki DNP, Devers absent, Chisholm wrong game, Doyle DNP).
patterns_identified.adjustment_rule: Verify the picked hitter is on the actual gamePk roster within 90 minutes of first pitch; do not publish Hits chips before lineup confirmation.

patterns_identified.summary: B tier ROI rebounded to 25.34% (W12 L6); confidence calibration looks healthier today.
patterns_identified.adjustment_rule: Lift the 5 point B tier confidence haircut once 7 day rolling B tier ROI is back above plus 5 percent (today's B tier delivered).

patterns_identified.summary: Hits chips referenced players not on the gamePk roster (Devers, Chisholm). Pick generation is mapping the wrong batter to the wrong game.
patterns_identified.adjustment_rule: Validate every Hitter prop pick by checking the player ID against the gamePk team roster from the MLB API before publishing.

patterns_identified.summary: Coors F5 ML lost again; cold weather Coors model kept undershooting how late the home offense lights up.
patterns_identified.adjustment_rule: Do not take F5 ML on the visiting team at Coors when the home pitcher has a track record of escaping the first 5 with limited damage; Coors edges accumulate after the 5th.

patterns_identified.summary: Hits over 0.5 props at conf 60 went 6 and 8; 8 0-fers across watch tier picks suggests blanket coverage adds noise.
patterns_identified.adjustment_rule: Cap Hits over 0.5 props to confirmed lineup leadoff/2 hole hitters with at least 4 expected at bats and recent 7 day batting average over 0.260.

patterns_identified.summary: Both Over leans at park amplifier venues stayed well under (5 each). Park profile alone is not enough; both starters were sharp.
patterns_identified.adjustment_rule: Do not lean Over on Total when both starters carry season ERA below 3.50 even at hitter friendly parks.

patterns_identified.summary: F5 ML went 3 and 4 with 2 pushes. Two heavy chalk F5 plays at minus 200 plus odds (CWS, CLE) lost outright.
patterns_identified.adjustment_rule: Do not lay more than minus 175 on F5 ML when chosen starter has a single previous start with at least 3 ER allowed in last 14 days.

patterns_identified.summary: ML went 5 and 6 with chalk teams (CLE -223, ATL hosting LAD type alignments). Pricing tighter than form.
patterns_identified.adjustment_rule: Lower ML confidence by 5 when home dog price beats plus 110 and starter ERA delta vs opposing starter is under 1.00.
